ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "ons_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "ons_region_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the region in which the election takes place */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "constituency_type" TEXT /* Type of constituency (e.g., County, Borough) */,
  "declaration_time" TEXT /* Time when the election results are declared */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, Local, By-election) */,
  "mandate_start" TEXT /* Start date of the elected term */,
  "mandate_end" TEXT /* End date of the elected term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ons_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "ons_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election identifier */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the election (e.g., Lab hold, Con gain) */,
  "first_party" TEXT /* Party that received the most votes */,
  "second_party" TEXT /* Party that received the second most votes */,
  "third_party" TEXT /* Party that received the third most votes */,
  "electorate" INTEGER /* Total electorate in the constituency */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of valid votes cast */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of invalid votes cast */,
  "majority" INTEGER /* Majority of votes received */,
  "swing" REAL /* Swing percentage compared to the previous election */,
  "turnout_change" REAL /* Change in turnout percentage compared to the previous election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ons_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_votes" (
  "ons_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election identifier */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ons_id", "party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "ons_id" TEXT /* Reference to the election identifier */,
  "total_electorate" INTEGER /* Total number of eligible voters in the constituency */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of valid votes cast */,
  "previous_turnout" REAL /* Turnout percentage in the previous election */,
  "turnout_change" REAL /* Change in turnout percentage compared to the previous election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ons_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Data Entry, Analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
